---
title: "Spam_Detection_Classification"
author: "J Chen"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Project 4

### Approach

1.  Select source for spam classification training (sample from class <https://spamassassin.apache.org/old/publiccorpus/>)
2.  Download the selected spam/ham libraries and upload into github
3.  Setup libraries and load data
4.  Build corpus and train
5.  Run program
6.  Evaluate results
